summary.summary: Replaces the Onboarding pump option label for Omnipod from "All Omnipod Types" to "Omnipod" in the onboarding view implementation (OnboardingView+Util.swift). (commit:71c5e87d966f) (commit:b40ab40b1e37) Files listed as changed include Trio/Sources/Modules/Onboarding/View/OnboardingView+Util.swift and the localization file Trio/Sources/Localizations/Main/Localizable.xcstrings. (file:956fad919c73) (file:4d0c5f6b86e5)
summary.userFacingImpact: Onboarding will show the shorter label "Omnipod" instead of "All Omnipod Types", intended to avoid a UI break caused by the longer string. (pr:nightscout/Trio#1255) (diff:fc634e17e917) The supplied diff and PR description indicate this is a presentation/text change limited to the onboarding selection label; no other behavioral changes are shown in the provided diff. (diff:fc634e17e917)
